raw_sql:
SELECT id, info 
FROM info_type 
WHERE info IN ('rating', 'genres', 'countries', 'runtimes', 'votes')
ORDER BY id;

WITH movie_company_countries AS (
    SELECT 
        mc.movie_id,
        COUNT(DISTINCT cn.country_code) AS n_countries
    FROM movie_companies mc
    JOIN company_name cn ON cn.id = mc.company_id
    JOIN title t ON t.id = mc.movie_id
    WHERE t.production_year BETWEEN 1995 AND 2015
      AND t.kind_id = 1  -- movies only
      AND cn.country_code IS NOT NULL
      AND cn.country_code != ''
    GROUP BY mc.movie_id
)
SELECT 
    CASE WHEN n_countries = 1 THEN 'single-country'
         WHEN n_countries >= 2 THEN 'multi-country'
    END AS production_type,
    COUNT(*) AS n_movies,
    ROUND(AVG(n_countries), 2) AS avg_countries
FROM movie_company_countries
GROUP BY production_type
ORDER BY production_type;

groupby_keys: CASE WHEN (movie_company_countries.n_countries = 1) THEN 'single-country'::text WHEN (movie_company_countries.n_countries >= 2) THEN 'multi-country'::text ELSE NULL::text END

raw_sql:
WITH movie_company_countries AS (
    SELECT 
        mc.movie_id,
        COUNT(DISTINCT cn.country_code) AS n_countries
    FROM movie_companies mc
    JOIN company_name cn ON cn.id = mc.company_id
    JOIN title t ON t.id = mc.movie_id
    WHERE t.production_year BETWEEN 1995 AND 2015
      AND t.kind_id = 1
      AND cn.country_code IS NOT NULL
      AND cn.country_code != ''
    GROUP BY mc.movie_id
),
classified AS (
    SELECT movie_id,
           CASE WHEN n_countries >= 2 THEN 'multi' ELSE 'single' END AS prod_type
    FROM movie_company_countries
)
SELECT 
    c.prod_type,
    COUNT(*) AS n_rated,
    ROUND(AVG(mii.info::numeric), 3) AS avg_rating,
    ROUND(PERCENTILE_CONT(0.5) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY mii.info::numeric)::numeric, 2) AS median_rating,
    ROUND(STDDEV(mii.info::numeric)::numeric, 3) AS stddev_rating,
    ROUND(MIN(mii.info::numeric)::numeric, 1) AS min_rating,
    ROUND(MAX(mii.info::numeric)::numeric, 1) AS max_rating
FROM classified c
JOIN movie_info_idx mii ON mii.movie_id = c.movie_id AND mii.info_type_id = 101
WHERE mii.info ~ '^\d+\.?\d*$'
GROUP BY c.prod_type
ORDER BY c.prod_type;

WITH movie_company_countries AS (
    SELECT 
        mc.movie_id,
        COUNT(DISTINCT cn.country_code) AS n_countries
    FROM movie_companies mc
    JOIN company_name cn ON cn.id = mc.company_id
    JOIN title t ON t.id = mc.movie_id
    WHERE t.production_year BETWEEN 1995 AND 2015
      AND t.kind_id = 1
      AND cn.country_code IS NOT NULL
      AND cn.country_code != ''
    GROUP BY mc.movie_id
),
classified AS (
    SELECT movie_id,
           CASE WHEN n_countries >= 2 THEN 'multi' ELSE 'single' END AS prod_type
    FROM movie_company_countries
),
runtimes AS (
    SELECT movie_id, 
           (regexp_match(info, '^\d+'))[1]::integer AS runtime_mins
    FROM movie_info
    WHERE info_type_id = 1
      AND info ~ '^\d+'
)
SELECT 
    c.prod_type,
    COUNT(*) AS n_with_runtime,
    ROUND(AVG(r.runtime_mins), 1) AS avg_runtime,
    ROUND(PERCENTILE_CONT(0.5) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY r.runtime_mins)::numeric, 0) AS median_runtime,
    ROUND(STDDEV(r.runtime_mins)::numeric, 1) AS stddev_runtime
FROM classified c
JOIN runtimes r ON r.movie_id = c.movie_id
WHERE r.runtime_mins BETWEEN 30 AND 300
GROUP BY c.prod_type
ORDER BY c.prod_type;

WITH movie_company_countries AS (
    SELECT 
        mc.movie_id,
        COUNT(DISTINCT cn.country_code) AS n_countries
    FROM movie_companies mc
    JOIN company_name cn ON cn.id = mc.company_id
    JOIN title t ON t.id = mc.movie_id
    WHERE t.production_year BETWEEN 1995 AND 2015
      AND t.kind_id = 1
      AND cn.country_code IS NOT NULL
      AND cn.country_code != ''
    GROUP BY mc.movie_id
),
classified AS (
    SELECT movie_id,
           CASE WHEN n_countries >= 2 THEN 'multi' ELSE 'single' END AS prod_type
    FROM movie_company_countries
),
genre_counts AS (
    SELECT c.prod_type, mi.info AS genre, COUNT(*) AS n
    FROM classified c
    JOIN movie_info mi ON mi.movie_id = c.movie_id AND mi.info_type_id = 3
    GROUP BY c.prod_type, mi.info
),
totals AS (
    SELECT prod_type, SUM(n) AS total FROM genre_counts GROUP BY prod_type
)
SELECT 
    gc.genre,
    gc.prod_type,
    gc.n,
    ROUND(100.0 * gc.n / t.total, 2) AS pct
FROM genre_counts gc
JOIN totals t ON t.prod_type = gc.prod_type
WHERE gc.n >= 500
ORDER BY gc.genre, gc.prod_type;

WITH movie_company_countries AS (
    SELECT 
        mc.movie_id,
        COUNT(DISTINCT cn.country_code) AS n_countries
    FROM movie_companies mc
    JOIN company_name cn ON cn.id = mc.company_id
    JOIN title t ON t.id = mc.movie_id
    WHERE t.production_year BETWEEN 1995 AND 2015
      AND t.kind_id = 1
      AND cn.country_code IS NOT NULL
      AND cn.country_code != ''
    GROUP BY mc.movie_id
),
classified AS (
    SELECT movie_id,
           CASE WHEN n_countries >= 2 THEN 'multi' ELSE 'single' END AS prod_type
    FROM movie_company_countries
),
-- Count distinct cast members who have aka_name entries (proxy for international talent)
cast_aka AS (
    SELECT 
        ci.movie_id,
        COUNT(DISTINCT ci.person_id) AS total_cast,
        COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN an.person_id IS NOT NULL THEN ci.person_id END) AS intl_cast
    FROM classified cl
    JOIN cast_info ci ON ci.movie_id = cl.movie_id
    LEFT JOIN (SELECT DISTINCT person_id FROM aka_name) an ON an.person_id = ci.person_id
    WHERE ci.role_id IN (1, 2)  -- actor/actress
    GROUP BY ci.movie_id
)
SELECT 
    cl.prod_type,
    COUNT(*) AS n_movies,
    ROUND(AVG(ca.total_cast), 1) AS avg_cast_size,
    ROUND(AVG(ca.intl_cast), 1) AS avg_intl_cast,
    ROUND(AVG(100.0 * ca.intl_cast / NULLIF(ca.total_cast, 0)), 2) AS avg_pct_intl_cast
FROM classified cl
JOIN cast_aka ca ON ca.movie_id = cl.movie_id
GROUP BY cl.prod_type
ORDER BY cl.prod_type;

WITH movie_company_countries AS (
    SELECT 
        mc.movie_id,
        COUNT(DISTINCT cn.country_code) AS n_countries
    FROM movie_companies mc
    JOIN company_name cn ON cn.id = mc.company_id
    JOIN title t ON t.id = mc.movie_id
    WHERE t.production_year BETWEEN 1995 AND 2015
      AND t.kind_id = 1
      AND cn.country_code IS NOT NULL
      AND cn.country_code != ''
    GROUP BY mc.movie_id
),
classified AS (
    SELECT movie_id,
           CASE WHEN n_countries >= 2 THEN 'multi' ELSE 'single' END AS prod_type
    FROM movie_company_countries
)
SELECT 
    c.prod_type,
    COUNT(*) AS n_with_votes,
    ROUND(AVG(mii.info::numeric)) AS avg_votes,
    ROUND(PERCENTILE_CONT(0.5) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY mii.info::numeric)::numeric) AS median_votes,
    COUNT(CASE WHEN mii.info::numeric >= 1000 THEN 1 END) AS n_over_1k_votes,
    ROUND(100.0 * COUNT(CASE WHEN mii.info::numeric >= 1000 THEN 1 END) / COUNT(*), 1) AS pct_over_1k
FROM classified c
JOIN movie_info_idx mii ON mii.movie_id = c.movie_id AND mii.info_type_id = 100
WHERE mii.info ~ '^\d+$'
GROUP BY c.prod_type
ORDER BY c.prod_type;

WITH movie_company_countries AS (
    SELECT 
        mc.movie_id,
        COUNT(DISTINCT cn.country_code) AS n_countries
    FROM movie_companies mc
    JOIN company_name cn ON cn.id = mc.company_id
    JOIN title t ON t.id = mc.movie_id
    WHERE t.production_year BETWEEN 1995 AND 2015
      AND t.kind_id = 1
      AND cn.country_code IS NOT NULL
      AND cn.country_code != ''
    GROUP BY mc.movie_id
),
classified AS (
    SELECT movie_id,
           CASE WHEN n_countries >= 2 THEN 'multi' ELSE 'single' END AS prod_type
    FROM movie_company_countries
),
votes AS (
    SELECT movie_id, info::numeric AS n_votes
    FROM movie_info_idx WHERE info_type_id = 100 AND info ~ '^\d+$'
),
ratings AS (
    SELECT movie_id, info::numeric AS rating
    FROM movie_info_idx WHERE info_type_id = 101 AND info ~ '^\d+\.?\d*$'
)
SELECT 
    c.prod_type,
    vote_bucket,
    COUNT(*) AS n_movies,
    ROUND(AVG(r.rating)::numeric, 3) AS avg_rating,
    ROUND(PERCENTILE_CONT(0.5) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY r.rating)::numeric, 2) AS median_rating
FROM classified c
JOIN votes v ON v.movie_id = c.movie_id
JOIN ratings r ON r.movie_id = c.movie_id
CROSS JOIN LATERAL (
    SELECT CASE 
        WHEN v.n_votes < 100 THEN '1: <100'
        WHEN v.n_votes < 1000 THEN '2: 100-999'
        WHEN v.n_votes < 10000 THEN '3: 1k-9.9k'
        WHEN v.n_votes < 100000 THEN '4: 10k-99k'
        ELSE '5: 100k+'
    END AS vote_bucket
) vb
GROUP BY c.prod_type, vote_bucket
ORDER BY vote_bucket, c.prod_type;

groupby_keys: (CASE WHEN ((movie_info_idx.info)::numeric < '100'::numeric) THEN '1: <100'::text WHEN ((movie_info_idx.info)::numeric < '1000'::numeric) THEN '2: 100-999'::text WHEN ((movie_info_idx.info)::numeric < '10000'::numeric) THEN '3: 1k-9.9k'::text WHEN ((movie_info_idx.info)::numeric < '100000'::numeric) THEN '4: 10k-99k'::text ELSE '5: 100k+'::text END)

raw_sql:
WITH movie_company_countries AS (
    SELECT 
        mc.movie_id,
        COUNT(DISTINCT cn.country_code) AS n_countries
    FROM movie_companies mc
    JOIN company_name cn ON cn.id = mc.company_id
    JOIN title t ON t.id = mc.movie_id
    WHERE t.production_year BETWEEN 1995 AND 2015
      AND t.kind_id = 1
      AND cn.country_code IS NOT NULL
      AND cn.country_code != ''
    GROUP BY mc.movie_id
),
classified AS (
    SELECT movie_id,
           CASE WHEN n_countries >= 2 THEN 'multi' ELSE 'single' END AS prod_type
    FROM movie_company_countries
),
ratings AS (
    SELECT movie_id, info::numeric AS rating
    FROM movie_info_idx WHERE info_type_id = 101 AND info ~ '^\d+\.?\d*$'
),
votes AS (
    SELECT movie_id, info::numeric AS n_votes
    FROM movie_info_idx WHERE info_type_id = 100 AND info ~ '^\d+$'
),
genres AS (
    SELECT movie_id, info AS genre
    FROM movie_info WHERE info_type_id = 3
)
SELECT 
    g.genre,
    c.prod_type,
    COUNT(*) AS n,
    ROUND(AVG(r.rating)::numeric, 3) AS avg_rating,
    ROUND(AVG(v.n_votes)) AS avg_votes
FROM classified c
JOIN ratings r ON r.movie_id = c.movie_id
JOIN votes v ON v.movie_id = c.movie_id
JOIN genres g ON g.movie_id = c.movie_id
WHERE g.genre IN ('Drama','Action','Comedy','Documentary','Horror','Thriller','Crime','Adventure')
GROUP BY g.genre, c.prod_type
HAVING COUNT(*) >= 100
ORDER BY g.genre, c.prod_type;

WITH movie_company_countries AS (
    SELECT 
        mc.movie_id,
        COUNT(DISTINCT cn.country_code) AS n_countries
    FROM movie_companies mc
    JOIN company_name cn ON cn.id = mc.company_id
    JOIN title t ON t.id = mc.movie_id
    WHERE t.production_year BETWEEN 1995 AND 2015
      AND t.kind_id = 1
      AND cn.country_code IS NOT NULL
      AND cn.country_code != ''
    GROUP BY mc.movie_id
),
classified AS (
    SELECT movie_id,
           CASE WHEN n_countries >= 2 THEN 'multi' ELSE 'single' END AS prod_type
    FROM movie_company_countries
),
ratings AS (
    SELECT movie_id, info::numeric AS rating
    FROM movie_info_idx WHERE info_type_id = 101 AND info ~ '^\d+\.?\d*$'
),
votes AS (
    SELECT movie_id, info::numeric AS n_votes
    FROM movie_info_idx WHERE info_type_id = 100 AND info ~ '^\d+$'
),
genres AS (
    SELECT movie_id, info AS genre
    FROM movie_info WHERE info_type_id = 3
)
SELECT 
    g.genre,
    c.prod_type,
    COUNT(*) AS n,
    ROUND(AVG(r.rating)::numeric, 3) AS avg_rating,
    ROUND(PERCENTILE_CONT(0.5) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY r.rating)::numeric, 2) AS median_rating
FROM classified c
JOIN ratings r ON r.movie_id = c.movie_id
JOIN votes v ON v.movie_id = c.movie_id AND v.n_votes BETWEEN 100 AND 999
JOIN genres g ON g.movie_id = c.movie_id
WHERE g.genre IN ('Drama','Action','Comedy','Documentary','Horror','Thriller','Crime','Adventure')
GROUP BY g.genre, c.prod_type
HAVING COUNT(*) >= 50
ORDER BY g.genre, c.prod_type;

WITH movie_company_countries AS (
    SELECT 
        mc.movie_id,
        COUNT(DISTINCT cn.country_code) AS n_countries
    FROM movie_companies mc
    JOIN company_name cn ON cn.id = mc.company_id
    JOIN title t ON t.id = mc.movie_id
    WHERE t.production_year BETWEEN 1995 AND 2015
      AND t.kind_id = 1
      AND cn.country_code IS NOT NULL
      AND cn.country_code != ''
    GROUP BY mc.movie_id
),
classified AS (
    SELECT mc.movie_id,
           CASE WHEN n_countries >= 2 THEN 'multi' ELSE 'single' END AS prod_type
    FROM movie_company_countries mc
),
ratings AS (
    SELECT movie_id, info::numeric AS rating
    FROM movie_info_idx WHERE info_type_id = 101 AND info ~ '^\d+\.?\d*$'
),
votes AS (
    SELECT movie_id, info::numeric AS n_votes
    FROM movie_info_idx WHERE info_type_id = 100 AND info ~ '^\d+$'
)
SELECT 
    t.production_year,
    c.prod_type,
    COUNT(*) AS n_movies,
    ROUND(AVG(r.rating)::numeric, 3) AS avg_rating,
    ROUND(AVG(v.n_votes)) AS avg_votes,
    ROUND(100.0 * COUNT(*) / SUM(COUNT(*)) OVER (PARTITION BY t.production_year), 1) AS pct_of_year
FROM classified c
JOIN title t ON t.id = c.movie_id
JOIN ratings r ON r.movie_id = c.movie_id
JOIN votes v ON v.movie_id = c.movie_id
WHERE v.n_votes BETWEEN 100 AND 9999  -- comparable engagement tier
GROUP BY t.production_year, c.prod_type
ORDER BY t.production_year, c.prod_type;
